name: Fairchild, J. A.
clubs: Vice President, Garland Society, second term, 1921-22
description: "J. A." has been with us but one year. He has won the friendship of all, and made an excellent record in our school.
text: "J. A." has been with us but one year. He has won the friendship of all, and made an excellent record in our school.

name: Godley, Ves
description: "Perry" has at last served his time with us; his determination is his chief asset.
text: "Perry" has at last served his time with us; his determination is his chief asset.

name: Nowell, Ruby
clubs: Member, Y. W. C. A. Cabinet
description: Ruby has made a host of friends while here and she will be missed in the future work of the school.
text: Ruby has made a host of friends while here and she will be missed in the future work of the school.

name: Mayfield, Mary
clubs: Secretary of Y. W. C. A., 1921-'22
Secretary of Yuma society first term, 1921-'22
description: Being sincere, kind, and true, her association with us has been helpful to all.
text: Being sincere, kind, and true, her association with us has been helpful to all.

name: Hosey, Annie
motto: Education before men.
clubs: Chaplain of Garland society three terms
Vice president of Y. W. C. A., 1921-'22
Salutatorian of the class and class prophet
Home Ec. editor of Mule Rider staff
description: Too studious to spare the men any of her time, but always ready to do anything that will help the school.
text:
Education before men.
Too studious to spare the men any of her time, but always ready to do anything that will help the school.

name: Sparks, Rufus
clubs: Member of Y. M. C. A. Cabinet, 1920-'21
description: He is a deserving student who has more patience than the average. He is inclined to write poetry.
text: He is a deserving student who has more patience than the average. He is inclined to write poetry.

name: Hearn, Mabel
description: Mabel is an excellent student and is loved by all who know her. Expression is her specialty.
text: Mabel is an excellent student and is loved by all who know her. Expression is her specialty.

name: Middlebrooks, F. O.
clubs: Vice president, Garland society third term, '19-'20
Vice president, Garland society third term, '20-'21
Vice president, Garland society first term, '21-'22
description: "Brooks" is witty and good-natured, always does his part in athletics as well as in school work. His only bad habit is breaking girls' hearts.
text: "Brooks" is witty and good-natured, always does his part in athletics as well as in school work. His only bad habit is breaking girls' hearts.

name: McClure, Ethel
description: Ethel is quiet, studious, good-natured and loved by all.
text: Ethel is quiet, studious, good-natured and loved by all.

name: Parham, Mary
description: A beauty contest winner who has also won the friendship of all the "Aggies;"
text: A beauty contest winner who has also won the friendship of all the "Aggies;"

name: Chisholm, A. T.
description: "Chiz" is always busy at something. He always responds when called on and will succeed as a lecturer.
text: "Chiz" is always busy at something. He always responds when called on and will succeed as a lecturer.

name: DeLaughter, Bess
clubs: Secretary of Garland society second term, 1921-'22
Vice president of Home Ec. Club, '22
description: A musical, studious and social combination. Bess is efficient and will be a leader.
text: A musical, studious and social combination. Bess is efficient and will be a leader.

name: Wilkinson, Marie
clubs: Secretary of Yuma society, second term, 1921-'22
Art editor of Mule Rider staff
description: "Ma" is good natured and jolly—a good student, but a man-hater.
text: "Ma" is good natured and jolly—a good student, but a man-hater.

name: McCollum, Vera Mae
motto: "Enjoy life while young."
clubs: Secretary of Garland society third term, 1920-'21
description: She always greets you with a smile.
text:
"Enjoy life while young."
She always greets you with a smile.

name: McNees, Hugh
clubs: President of Yuma society second term, 1920-'21
Agricultural editor of Mule Rider staff
description: Hugh is the most studious of our class. He is quiet, but speaks when proper.
text: Hugh is the most studious of our class. He is quiet, but speaks when proper.

name: Irwin, Ruby
description: In her you will find a true friend with a lovable nature. She is studious and deserving, and has been an "A" pupil.
text: In her you will find a true friend with a lovable nature. She is studious and deserving, and has been an "A" pupil.

name: Proctor, Louise
motto: A merry heart doeth good like a medicine.
text: A merry heart doeth good like a medicine.

name: Measeles, Anna Mae
motto: She doeth little kindnesses which most leave undone or despise.
text: She doeth little kindnesses which most leave undone or despise.

name: Campbell, Roy
motto: None but himself could be his parallel.
text: None but himself could be his parallel.

name: Dumas, Ned
motto: Did you ever hold your best girl in a forget-me-not manner? You have? Oh, boy! Ain't it great?
text: Did you ever hold your best girl in a forget-me-not manner? You have? Oh, boy! Ain't it great?

name: Tipton, Troy
motto: He was so ugly that he broke the camera. Therefore, no photo appears.
text: He was so ugly that he broke the camera. Therefore, no photo appears.

name: Franks, Royal
motto: "How I love its giddy gurgle, How I love its fluent flow—, How I love to wind my mouth up, How I love to hear it go!"
text: "How I love its giddy gurgle, How I love its fluent flow—, How I love to wind my mouth up, How I love to hear it go!"

name: Walker, Edna
motto: "Oh! If to dance all night and dress all day, would only charm old age away."
text: "Oh! If to dance all night and dress all day, would only charm old age away."

name: Hartsfield, Gertrude
motto: "Look on her and you'll forget 'em all, the Beauty Contestant."
text: "Look on her and you'll forget 'em all, the Beauty Contestant."

name: Wallace, Joseph
motto: "The only one in captivity. He likes the women."
text: "The only one in captivity. He likes the women."

name: Wallace, Alice
motto: "If silence were noise, she would be a whole brass band."
text: "If silence were noise, she would be a whole brass band."

name: Mullins, Edmond
motto: "Grow old along with me; the test is yet to be."
text: "Grow old along with me; the test is yet to be."

name: Gantt, Louise
motto: "We can't see her, but we can hear her; that's enough."
text: "We can't see her, but we can hear her; that's enough."

name: Stokes, Horace
motto: "I do not ask, O, Lord, that life may be a pleasant road."
text: "I do not ask, O, Lord, that life may be a pleasant road."

name: Andress, Irene
description: When she steps for dancing, her steps are so complete; The music nearly kills itself listening to her feet.
text: When she steps for dancing, her steps are so complete; The music nearly kills itself listening to her feet.

name: Graham, John
motto: "Say, why are beauties praised and honored most, The wise man's passion, and the vain man's toast? Oh, Mary!"
text: "Say, why are beauties praised and honored most, The wise man's passion, and the vain man's toast? Oh, Mary!"

name: Sanders, Faye
description: Smiles to all she extends. Oft she rejects, but never once offends.
text: Smiles to all she extends. Oft she rejects, but never once offends.

name: Horne, Curry
description: I say, "He, who does not love wine, women, and song, remains a fool his whole life long."
text: I say, "He, who does not love wine, women, and song, remains a fool his whole life long."

name: Camp, Daisy
motto: "A perfect woman, nobly planned to love, comfort, and command."
text: "A perfect woman, nobly planned to love, comfort, and command."

name: Burke, Onyx
motto: "Be good and you might be happy, but you'd miss a lot of fun."
text: "Be good and you might be happy, but you'd miss a lot of fun."

name: Mule, Rider
description: She is brilliant, clever, of a rare turn of mind; You'll have to look far to find one of her kind.
text: She is brilliant, clever, of a rare turn of mind; You'll have to look far to find one of her kind.

name: Delton, Maloch
description: A man of word as well as deed.
text: A man of word as well as deed.

name: Dolph, Greer
description: A glorious hunter, and his prey is "Florence."
text: A glorious hunter, and his prey is "Florence."

name: Tom, Dodson
description: Tom argues for "Domestic Science" and prefers his steak cooked.
text: Tom argues for "Domestic Science" and prefers his steak cooked.

name: Willamina, Pipkin
description: She's hunting a husband, One of great fame; A "regular heart smasher" Is her middle name.
text: She's hunting a husband, One of great fame; A "regular heart smasher" Is her middle name.

name: Charles, Spicer
description: If he ever falls in love, he is sure to drown.
text: If he ever falls in love, he is sure to drown.

name: Gladys, Smith
description: Of all things she'd rather be, She'd rather be a "flirt."
text: Of all things she'd rather be, She'd rather be a "flirt."

name: Fletcher, Parrott
description: He's all you could wish for, look for, hope for— "He's Fletcher."
text: He's all you could wish for, look for, hope for— "He's Fletcher."

name: Effie, Gunnels
description: May she live all the days of her life.
text: May she live all the days of her life.

name: Glenn, Souter
description: He is quiet and studious; but we think that his heart is with Alice.
text: He is quiet and studious; but we think that his heart is with Alice.

name: Ruth, Mast
description: A girl that's willing to do her share when any work comes her way.
text: A girl that's willing to do her share when any work comes her way.

name: Kenneth, Hamilton
motto: "If you're in need, He's a friend indeed."
text: "If you're in need, He's a friend indeed."

name: Ruby, Ware
description: This beautiful young lady is noted for visiting "Grandmother."
text: This beautiful young lady is noted for visiting "Grandmother."

name: Robert, Baker
description: Robert Baker is a good tailor as well as a bread-baker.
text: Robert Baker is a good tailor as well as a bread-baker.

name: Willard, Chaney
description: A big man with a "Mellow Voice."
text: A big man with a "Mellow Voice."

name: Ethel, Pendergast
motto: "My words fly up, my thoughts remain below, Words without thoughts never anywhere go."
text: "My words fly up, my thoughts remain below, Words without thoughts never anywhere go."

name: Pauline, Delaughter
description: The kiss of the sun on a half-blown rose.
text: The kiss of the sun on a half-blown rose.

name: Frank, Spicer
description: The surest way to hit a woman's heart is to take aim kneeling.
text: The surest way to hit a woman's heart is to take aim kneeling.

name: Baxter, Spencer
description: Likeness of heaven, agent of power.
text: Likeness of heaven, agent of power.

name: Stull, George
description: A fool is always talking.
text: A fool is always talking.

name: Phillips, Grace
description: Zeb is her song, Zeb is her theme, One would guess by listening, That he's a perfect dream.
text: Zeb is her song, Zeb is her theme, One would guess by listening, That he's a perfect dream.

name: Smith, Edna and Vera
motto: "Silver is better than gold."
description: Vera has a few words, but says: Edna— "Know all you can and profit by it."
text:
"Silver is better than gold."
Vera has a few words, but says: Edna— "Know all you can and profit by it."

name: Dumas, Alymer
description: Wisdom and good looks never go together.
text: Wisdom and good looks never go together.

name: Velvin, Katherine
description: I hope fortune will send as much as I can spend.
text: I hope fortune will send as much as I can spend.

name: King, Nora
description: Her heart is free, to win her, men have tried; They said they loved her—but she knew they lied.
text: Her heart is free, to win her, men have tried; They said they loved her—but she knew they lied.

name: Lowe, Zeb
description: If I am ever saved, It will be by Grace.
text: If I am ever saved, It will be by Grace.

name: Ray, Mcnees
description: Ray is quiet and studious, and tends to his business.
text: Ray is quiet and studious, and tends to his business.

name: Beatrice, Talley
motto: A gentle maid makes a good wife.
text: A gentle maid makes a good wife.

name: Frank, Epton
motto: Happy I am, from care I'm free; Why aren't they all contented like me?
text: Happy I am, from care I'm free; Why aren't they all contented like me?

name: Otis, Kemp
motto: None but himself can be himself.
text: None but himself can be himself.

name: Helen, Morgan
motto: Her kindness and her worth to spy, You need but look in Helen's eye.
text: Her kindness and her worth to spy, You need but look in Helen's eye.

name: Manuel, Harris
motto: A handsome young man, but can't make a hit with the girls that know him.
text: A handsome young man, but can't make a hit with the girls that know him.

name: Myzelle, Parrott
motto: There never was a minute that "Polly" wasn't in it.
text: There never was a minute that "Polly" wasn't in it.

name: Leonard, Rugg
motto: "Crip" is beautiful, you can see that, And as a speaker he is a "cat."
text: "Crip" is beautiful, you can see that, And as a speaker he is a "cat."

name: Walter, Daily
motto: A man without a sweetheart is like a fish without water.
text: A man without a sweetheart is like a fish without water.

name: Homer, Andress
motto: "Jonah" or "El Dorado Slim"— When you once meet him you never forget him.
text: "Jonah" or "El Dorado Slim"— When you once meet him you never forget him.

name: Gillie, Ridling
motto: Sparkling eyes and flaxen hair, But of that "Troy" beware!
text: Sparkling eyes and flaxen hair, But of that "Troy" beware!
